title: vitis thonningii
intro: Vitis thonningii, also known as the West African wild grape, is a plant species in the grape family (Vitaceae) native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Vitis thonningii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a laxative. Vitis thonningii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
